title: ICED chart-title metadata catalogue
description: Mirror of NITI Aayog's ICED `/chart-title` endpoint — every chart shown anywhere on the ICED dashboard with its page path, section, title, subtitle, footnote, and source attribution. Acts as the canonical source for `indicator.notes` text on any yen-gov indicator built from an ICED endpoint: rather than each adapter re-paraphrasing ICED's attribution, look the chart up here by `id` (or by `(page, section)`) and quote ICED's own footnote/source verbatim. This is a derived snapshot of an upstream catalogue, NOT hand-authored — `sources[]` carries the ICED URL. See docs/architecture/backend/sources-iced-api.md §chart_title.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Wraps the 581-entry chart-title catalogue ICED publishes at `/chart-title`. List shape (preserving ICED's array order) keyed implicitly by index; each entry carries the publisher-printed `chart_title`/`section_title`/`footnote`/`source` strings verbatim per CLAUDE.md §10 (adapter owns publisher vocabulary; no normalisation). Emitted by `tools/emit_iced_chart_titles.py`.

sources.description: Per CLAUDE.md §12. Exactly one entry: the ICED /chart-title URL this snapshot was derived from.

entries.description: One entry per chart in the ICED catalogue. Order preserved from upstream — same index ICED ships, so downstream consumers can diff snapshots by position.

id.description: ICED's chart identifier (stable across deployments). Use as the natural join key when binding to an indicator artifact.

page.description: Which ICED dashboard page hosts this chart (e.g. `homepage`, `state-wise-deep-dive`, `air-quality`).

section.description: Section within the page (chart container slug). Multiple charts may share a section.

url.description: ICED endpoint backing this chart, as ICED records it. Null when ICED doesn't expose the backing endpoint metadata. Useful for reverse-mapping our endpoints.py catalogue against what ICED actually renders.

tabs.description: Tab identifier when the chart appears under a tabbed container, else null. ICED ships either a string slug or a numeric year (e.g. 2007) depending on the chart type.

section_title.description: Section heading as ICED prints it. Often the headline a citizen would see ('Cumulative electric power Installed capacity from non-fossil fuel by 2030').

footnote.description: Publisher's footnote, period qualifier, or methodology note as ICED prints it. Reuse verbatim in indicator.notes per CLAUDE.md §10 — do NOT normalise.

source.description: Publisher's source attribution string (e.g. 'MNRE & CEA', 'MoSPI'). The CANONICAL source label for any yen-gov indicator built off this chart. Pass through verbatim.
